title: Crunchy Smoky Croatian Peanut Skewers
description: A smoky and flaky Croatian dish featuring roasted peanuts, perfect for a show-off snack or appetizer. This Whole30-friendly recipe is served on a tagliere.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together dashi extract, smoked paprika, garlic powder, sea salt, and black pepper.
Add the dry roasted peanuts to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Thread the spice-coated peanuts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each peanut.
Drizzle the coconut oil over the peanut skewers and toss to coat.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Crunchy Smoky Croatian Peanut Skewers on a tagliere.
